plain_english:
This $12.4M Jefferson Parish LA bond is notably higher-yielding than its peers.

At 5.41% yield-to-worst, it sits 127 basis points above the 4.14% average for similar A2/A-rated revenue bonds in the 2035 maturity range.

CALL RISK: Moderate call risk — callable in ~3 years at $100.00. Monitor refinancing conditions as call date approaches.

WHO IT'S FOR: Income-focused investors with a 10+ year horizon who are comfortable with small-issuer liquidity constraints and seeking above-market tax-exempt yield.

RED FLAG: Thin peer group (0 comps) — spread may not fully reflect market.
